column4: Final species list (one Genus_species per line)
column6: Authoritative list of species in the final set (e.g., species70). Plain text, one Genus_species per line.
Subset of the final species set for which a genome annotation file was available in STEP_2. Plain text, one Genus_species per line.
Provenance: which files (proteome, BLAST DB, genome annotation) were copied from STEP_2/STEP_3 into STEP_4 final outputs, per species. Tab-delimited.

column4: Per-species sequence tables (Phyloname, GIGANTIC ID, Length, Sequence)
column6: One TSV per species. Each row is one protein with its phyloname, GIGANTIC protein identifier, residue count, and amino acid sequence. Built from the T1 proteome FASTAs.
Count of proteins in each per-species sequence table TSV.
Log of the script that built the per-species sequence tables from FASTAs.
